verdict: The AI displacement risk for AI Researchers is moderate, with 72% of tasks automatable by current frontier models.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: AI Researchers develop and study methods and software for machines to perceive their environment and use learning and intelligence. This involves routine cognitive tasks such as document review, citation extraction, and motion drafting, which are already being automated by current frontier models.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment Limited
reasoning_steps.body: While AI Researchers may engage in some creative problem-solving, the field is not characterized by novel synthesis or original ideas. This limits the scope for human judgment and decision-making.

adjacent_careers.name: Machine Learning Engineer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both roles involve developing and applying AI methods, but Machine Learning Engineers focus more on the practical implementation.

adjacent_careers.name: Data Scientist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Data Scientists work with data to gain insights, while AI Researchers focus on developing and applying AI methods.

recent_developments.headline: New AI Model Achieves State-of-the-Art Performance in Natural Language Processing
recent_developments.impact: This development raises concerns about the potential for current frontier models to automate routine cognitive tasks, such as document review and citation extraction.

recent_developments.headline: AlphaFold reshapes structural biology research
recent_developments.impact: Predicted protein structures are now a default starting point for experimental design.

quotes.quote: AlphaFold has predicted the structure of nearly every known protein. Tasks that took a PhD student years now take seconds. The bottleneck has moved to the experiments and the questions.
quotes.speaker: Demis Hassabis
quotes.title: CEO, Google DeepMind; Nobel laureate in Chemistry 2024

quotes.quote: AI is the most profound technology humanity is working on, more profound than fire or electricity. In science it is already changing what is knowable.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet

quotes.quote: I can imagine a world where AI agents run thousands of experiments in parallel, and the human scientist's role becomes one of asking the right question and interpreting the result.
quotes.speaker: Fei-Fei Li
quotes.title: Co-Director, Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI
quotes.source: The Worlds I See / public lectures
